REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC. AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO AMEND IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO AMEND FILED AFTER THE DEMURRER WAS SUSTAINED WAS FILED BEFORE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER SUSTAINING THE DEMURER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WAS SERVED ON PLAINTIFF. MOVING PAPERS ARE INSUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT THE MOTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Feb-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS' MOTION TO DISMISS is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Action is dismissed with prejudice. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Continued To Mar-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Mtn To Dismiss For Fialure To Amend
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC. and MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend is DENIED without prejudice. Motion to dismiss for failure to amend filed after the demurrer was sustained was filed before Notice of Entry of Order Sustaining the Demurer with Leave to Amend was served on Plaintiff. Moving papers are insufficient to support the motion. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend
Off Calendar Sep-15-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC., NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC and REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend is DENIED. No order sustaining the demurrer was ever filed and no notice of entry of such order was served on plaintiff. CCP 472b, CRC 3.1320, CCP 1013. Prevailing party to prepare and submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC. and MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with 10 day leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurer. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Lillian K. Sing, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
